headline: S&P Dow Jones Warns of Potential Frontier-Market Cut for Turkey
summary: (Bloomberg) -- S&P Dow Jones Indices put Turkey on a watchlist for a potential cut to frontier-market status, joining MSCI Inc. in warning of downgrades.Most Read from BloombergGreece Offers Bounty to Catch Ravenous Fish Lured by Warming SeaChip Stocks Sink After Blistering Run as Oil Jumps: Markets WrapTwo Millennium Trading Pods Made About $3.7 Billion Last MonthMicrosoft’s Xbox to Cut 3,200 Jobs, Divest Five Studios in Major OverhaulChina Sentences Official to Death Over $325 Million in Bribe

headline: Is MSCI (MSCI) Turning Private-Market ESG Data Access Into Its Next Moat?
summary: On 7 July 2026, Petra Funds Group announced a relationship with MSCI that integrates MSCI’s sustainability, climate and ESG datasets into Petra’s PeerView ESG reporting service for private market managers. This collaboration opens access to institutional-grade ESG benchmarks and controversies data for mid-market private GPs, aligning their non-financial reporting with the reference points used by larger limited partners. Next, we’ll explore how MSCI’s expanded ESG data access for private...
